content.json:
## Cisco Email Threat Defense
This workbook visualizes email threat data from the Cisco ETD v5 connector querying **CiscoETDv2_CL** directly — fields are extracted at ingestion time by the DCR transform. Use the time range filter above to scope all tiles.

> **Note:** Verdict analysis excludes `update` events (re-remediation records that carry no sender/verdict data).

content.query:
CiscoETDv2_CL
| extend Folder = tostring(message['action']['folder'])
| summarize
    ['Total Events']       = count(),
    ['New Messages']       = countif(EventType =~ 'create'),
    ['Remediation Updates']= countif(EventType =~ 'update'),
    Phishing               = countif(Verdict =~ 'phishing'),
    Malicious              = countif(Verdict =~ 'malicious'),
    BEC                    = countif(Verdict =~ 'bec'),
    Graymail               = countif(Verdict =~ 'graymail'),
    Spam                   = countif(Verdict =~ 'spam'),
    Scam                   = countif(Verdict =~ 'scam'),
    Quarantined            = countif(Folder =~ 'quarantine'),
    ['Sent to Junk']       = countif(Folder =~ 'junk')
content.title: Message Summary

content.query:
CiscoETDv2_CL
| where EventType =~ 'create'
| where isnotempty(Verdict)
| summarize Count = count() by Verdict
| render piechart title = 'Messages by Verdict'
content.title: Messages by Verdict

content.query:
CiscoETDv2_CL
| where EventType =~ 'create'
| where isnotempty(Verdict)
| summarize Count = count() by bin(EventTime, 1h), Verdict
| render timechart title = 'Message Volume Over Time'
content.title: Message Volume Over Time (by Verdict)

content.query:
CiscoETDv2_CL
| where EventType =~ 'create'
| where isnotempty(Sender)
| summarize MessageCount = count(), Verdicts = make_set(Verdict, 5) by Sender
| top 10 by MessageCount desc
content.title: Top 10 Senders

content.query:
CiscoETDv2_CL
| where EventType =~ 'create'
| where isnotempty(Sender)
| extend SenderDomain = tostring(split(Sender, '@')[1])
| where isnotempty(SenderDomain)
| summarize MessageCount = count(), Verdicts = make_set(Verdict, 5) by SenderDomain
| top 10 by MessageCount desc
content.title: Top 10 Sender Domains

content.query:
CiscoETDv2_CL
| where EventType =~ 'create'
| where isnotempty(Recipient)
| summarize MessageCount = count(), Verdicts = make_set(Verdict, 5) by Recipient
| top 10 by MessageCount desc
content.title: Top 10 Targeted Recipients

content.query:
CiscoETDv2_CL
| where EventType =~ 'create'
| where isnotempty(Recipient)
| extend RecipientDomain = tostring(split(Recipient, '@')[1])
| where isnotempty(RecipientDomain)
| summarize MessageCount = count() by RecipientDomain
| top 10 by MessageCount desc
content.title: Top 10 Targeted Recipient Domains

content.query:
CiscoETDv2_CL
| where EventType =~ 'create'
| where isnotempty(Verdict)
| mv-expand detection = message['verdict']['detections']
| where isnotnull(detection)
| extend Technique = tostring(detection['technique'])
| where isnotempty(Technique)
| summarize Count = count() by Technique
| top 15 by Count desc
content.title: Top Detection Techniques

content.query:
CiscoETDv2_CL
| where EventType =~ 'create'
| where isnotempty(Verdict)
| extend BusinessRisk = tostring(message['verdict']['businessRisk'])
| where isnotempty(BusinessRisk)
| summarize Count = count() by BusinessRisk
| render piechart title = 'Business Risk'
content.title:
Business Risk
(phishing / malicious only)

content.query:
CiscoETDv2_CL
| where EventType =~ 'create'
| where isnotempty(Verdict)
| mv-expand detection = message['verdict']['detections']
| where isnotnull(detection)
| extend Technique    = tostring(detection['technique']),
         DetectionType = tostring(detection['type']),
         Description  = tostring(detection['description'])
| where isnotempty(Technique)
| summarize Count = count() by Verdict, Technique, DetectionType
| sort by Verdict asc, Count desc
| project Verdict, Technique, DetectionType, Count
content.title: Detection Technique Details

content.query:
CiscoETDv2_CL
| where EventType =~ 'create'
| extend Folder = tostring(message['action']['folder'])
| where isnotempty(Folder)
| summarize Count = count() by Folder
| render piechart title = 'Disposition Folder'
content.title:
Disposition Folder
(junk vs quarantine)

content.query:
CiscoETDv2_CL
| where EventType =~ 'create'
| where isnotempty(Verdict)
| extend Folder = tostring(message['action']['folder'])
| where isnotempty(Folder)
| summarize Count = count() by Verdict, Folder
| sort by Count desc
content.title: Verdict vs. Folder

content.query:
CiscoETDv2_CL
| where EventType =~ 'create'
| where isnotempty(Verdict)
| extend IsAutoRemediated = tostring(message['verdict']['isAutoRemediated'])
| extend ReclassifiedBy  = tostring(message['verdict']['reclassifiedBy'])
| where isnotempty(IsAutoRemediated)
| summarize Count = count() by IsAutoRemediated, ReclassifiedBy
| project ['Auto-Remediated'] = IsAutoRemediated, ['Reclassified By'] = ReclassifiedBy, Count
content.title: Auto-Remediation & Reclassification

content.query:
CiscoETDv2_CL
| where EventType =~ 'update'
| extend Folder       = tostring(message['action']['folder'])
| extend RemediatedBy = tostring(message['action']['remediatedBy'])
| extend ActionType   = tostring(message['action']['action'])
| project EventTime, MessageId, ActionType, Folder, RemediatedBy
| sort by EventTime desc
content.title: Remediation Update Events

content.query:
CiscoETDv2_CL
| where EventType =~ 'create'
| where isnotnull(message['attachments'])
| mv-expand attachment = message['attachments']
| extend FileName = tostring(attachment['filename'])
| where isnotempty(FileName)
| extend FileExt = tolower(extract(@'\.([^.]+)$', 1, FileName))
| where isnotempty(FileExt)
| summarize Count = count() by FileExt
| top 10 by Count desc
| render piechart title = 'Attachment File Types'
content.title: Attachment File Extensions

content.query:
CiscoETDv2_CL
| where EventType =~ 'create'
| where isnotnull(message['attachments'])
| mv-expand attachment = message['attachments']
| extend FileName = tostring(attachment['filename']),
         SHA256   = tostring(attachment['SHA256'])
| where isnotempty(SHA256)
// Deduplicate by SHA256 to find unique files seen across many messages
| summarize
    FileNames  = make_set(FileName, 10),
    TimeSeen   = count(),
    Verdicts   = make_set(Verdict, 5),
    Senders    = make_set(Sender, 10)
    by SHA256
| sort by TimeSeen desc
content.title: Unique Attachment Hashes (SHA256)

content.query:
// Uses the verdict detections array — type='sha256' entries flag files
// identified by threat intelligence, distinct from all attachments above
CiscoETDv2_CL
| where EventType =~ 'create'
| where Verdict =~ 'malicious'
| mv-expand detection = message['verdict']['detections']
| where tostring(detection['type']) =~ 'sha256'
| extend SHA256    = tostring(detection['description']),
         Technique = tostring(detection['technique'])
| where isnotempty(SHA256)
| summarize Count = count() by SHA256, Technique, Sender, Subject
| sort by Count desc
content.title: Malicious File Hashes (from Threat Detections)

content.query:
// URLs surfaced in the verdict detections array with type='url'
// These are the URLs Cisco ETD flagged as malicious/suspicious
CiscoETDv2_CL
| where EventType =~ 'create'
| where Verdict in~ ('phishing', 'malicious')
| mv-expand detection = message['verdict']['detections']
| where tostring(detection['type']) =~ 'url'
| extend MaliciousUrl = tostring(detection['description']),
         Technique    = tostring(detection['technique'])
| where isnotempty(MaliciousUrl)
| summarize Count = count(), Senders = make_set(Sender, 5) by MaliciousUrl, Technique
| sort by Count desc
content.title: Malicious URLs (flagged in Detections)

content.query:
// All URLs in urlMetadata across threat messages, grouped by domain
// Excludes HTML entities ( ) and mailto links
CiscoETDv2_CL
| where EventType =~ 'create'
| where Verdict in~ ('phishing', 'malicious', 'bec')
| where isnotnull(message['urlMetadata'])
| mv-expand urlItem = message['urlMetadata']
| extend Url = tostring(urlItem['url'])
| where isnotempty(Url)
    and Url !startswith '&'
    and Url !startswith 'http://mailto'
    and not(Url matches regex @'^www\.')
| extend UrlDomain = extract(@'^https?://([^/?#\s]+)', 1, Url)
| where isnotempty(UrlDomain)
| summarize Count = count() by UrlDomain
| top 20 by Count desc
content.title: Top URL Domains in Threat Messages

content.query:
// clientIp = the external IP that delivered mail to the Cisco gateway
// This is meaningful: hotmail.com sends from Azure IPs, gmail.com from Google IPs, etc.
CiscoETDv2_CL
| where EventType =~ 'create'
| extend ClientIp = tostring(message['clientIp'])
| where isnotempty(ClientIp)
| summarize
    MessageCount = count(),
    Verdicts     = make_set(Verdict, 5),
    Senders      = make_set(Sender, 10)
    by ClientIp
| sort by MessageCount desc
content.title: Top Sending Client IPs

content.query:
CiscoETDv2_CL
| where EventType =~ 'create'
| where Verdict in~ ('phishing', 'malicious', 'bec')
| extend ClientIp = tostring(message['clientIp'])
| where isnotempty(ClientIp)
| summarize
    ThreatCount  = count(),
    Verdicts     = make_set(Verdict, 5),
    Senders      = make_set(Sender, 5),
    Subjects     = make_set(Subject, 5)
    by ClientIp
| sort by ThreatCount desc
content.title: Threat-Associated Sending IPs

content.query:
CiscoETDv2_CL
| where EventType =~ 'create'
| where Verdict in~ ('phishing', 'malicious', 'bec')
| extend ClientIp     = tostring(message['clientIp'])
| extend Folder       = tostring(message['action']['folder'])
| extend BusinessRisk = tostring(message['verdict']['businessRisk'])
| extend HasAttach    = isnotnull(message['attachments']) and array_length(message['attachments']) > 0
| extend HasMalUrl    = isnotnull(message['verdict']['detections'])
| project
    EventTime,
    MessageId,
    Verdict,
    BusinessRisk,
    Sender,
    Recipient,
    Subject,
    Folder,
    ['Has Attachments'] = HasAttach,
    ['Has Malicious URL'] = HasMalUrl,
    ClientIp
| sort by EventTime desc
| take 100
content.title: Recent High-Threat Messages (Phishing / Malicious / BEC)

content.query:
CiscoETDv2_CL
| where EventType =~ 'create'
| where isnotempty(Subject) and isnotempty(Verdict)
| where Verdict in~ ('phishing', 'malicious', 'bec')
| project EventTime, Verdict, Subject, Sender, Recipient
| sort by EventTime desc
content.title: Subject Lines in Threat Messages
